summary_en: Yoshicon acquired 100,000 treasury shares (1.43% of outstanding) for ¥219M via ToSTNeT-3 on May 18, 2026, as part of a Board-authorized program to acquire up to 200,000 shares (2.86% S/O) for up to ¥500M through March 31, 2027.
title_en: Notice Regarding Results of Treasury Stock Acquisition via Off-Exchange Trading Transaction (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Yoshicon Co., Ltd. (Code 5280) filed a press release on May 18, 2026, announcing the completion of a treasury stock acquisition executed on the same date. The company purchased 100,000 ordinary shares for a total consideration of ¥219,000,000 through the Tokyo Stock Exchange's off-exchange trading system (ToSTNeT-3). This acquisition represents approximately 1.43% of shares outstanding (excluding treasury stock). The purchase was conducted under the Board of Directors' resolution dated April 30, 2026, which authorized a program to acquire up to 200,000 shares (2.86% of outstanding) for up to ¥500,000,000 during the period from May 1, 2026 through March 31, 2027. The stated purpose is to implement flexible capital policies in accordance with the company's articles of incorporation. As of the disclosure date, cumulative purchases under this program totaled 100,000 shares for ¥219,000,000.
